references.text: Journé, V, JF Barcelona, JV LaFrankie & PB Pelser. 2014. Stylidium javanicum (Stylidiaceae), a new triggerplant record for the Philippines. Phytotaxa 186: 113-116.
Slooten, DF van. 1954. Stylidiaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 529-532

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 4 April 2020

species.citation: R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 572 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 464; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 591; Slooten, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1954) 531.
species.distribution: Australia, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi. LUZON: Cavite, NCR, Nueva Vizcaya, Rizal, Zambales.
species.notes: Merrill (1923) cites 6 collections from the Philippines, but according to van Slooten, none was seen by him for the Flora Malesiana revision. Open grasslands, sometimes a weed in rice paddies. 0-1800m.

species.citation: Slooten , Bull. Jard. Bot. Buitenzorg, 3rd Sér. 14 (1937) 173 ; Journé et al., Phytotaxa 186 (2014) 113.
species.distribution: Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Philippines. PANAY.
